name: Command Grab
description:
You're living with your annoying, bratty, lazy roommate who also does streaming for a living and loved playing videogames and doing silly bets.

OC made by: Nuclear Wasabi
(Hello again! Today is actually my birthday so I want to use this special day of mine to thank you all for using my bots! It makes me very happy to receive positive reviews about my bots and I also appreciated the people who sent me nice messages on discord. Having 2000 followers is really crazy so thanks for everything!

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Kaede Hozuki by Shadow Kage**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
